brand_identity.name: BoatMyCareer.com
brand_identity.tagline: Navigate Your Future with Scientific Precision

headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3 headings. Adds academic prestige and authority.

body.usage: Use for all body text, UI elements, and data displays. Clean and legible.

mono.usage: Use sparingly for data points, test scores, or technical details.

primary.name: Deep Navy
primary.usage: Primary buttons, active states, key headings. Signals authority.

secondary.name: Sage Green
secondary.usage: Success states, growth indicators, secondary buttons. Signals balance.

accent.name: Terracotta
accent.usage: Call to actions (CTAs), highlights, urgent notifications. Signals human connection.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

buttons.primary: bg-[#1A2B4B] text-white hover:bg-[#1A2B4B]/90 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-[#F2F0EB] text-[#1A2B4B] hover:bg-[#E5E2DB] rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-[#1A2B4B]/20 text-[#1A2B4B] hover:bg-[#1A2B4B]/5 rounded-md px-6 py-3 font-medium transition-all

cards.base: bg-white border border-black/5 rounded-xl shadow-card p-6 relative overflow-hidden

inputs.base: bg-white border border-black/10 rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#1A2B4B]/20 focus:border-[#1A2B4B] outline-none transition-all

marketing.name: The Tetris Grid (Mode A)
marketing.usage: Use for Landing Page sections (Why Us, How It Works). Avoid equal-width columns.

dashboard.name: High Density Grid (Mode B)
dashboard.usage: Use for Student/Admin Dashboards. Maximize screen real estate.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. Use #1A1A1A for body text on light backgrounds.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus rings required. Use ring-2 ring-offset-2 ring-[#1A2B4B]/50.

media.image_style: Authentic, candid, warm lighting. Avoid staged 'corporate' stock photos. Use images with depth.
media.icons: Phosphor Icons (Regular weight for UI, Duotone for Features).

hero_section.alt: Group of diverse students studying together
hero_section.description: Use as the main hero image. Represents collaboration and focus.
Use for 'Reach' or 'Impact' sections. Authentic Indian context.

counseling_section.description: Use for 'How it Works' or 'Expert Guidance' section.

psychometric_section.alt: Abstract geometric lines representing neural connections
psychometric_section.description: Use as a subtle background or accent for the 'Scientific Assessment' section.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. IMPLEMENT THEME: Set up the Tailwind config with the 'Academic Trust' color palette immediately.
2. FONT SETUP: Import 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' from Google Fonts in index.css.
3. COMPONENT OVERRIDES: Customize Shadcn components to remove the default 'zinc' look. Use the 'Deep Navy' and 'Sage Green' palette.
4. LANDING PAGE: Build the landing page using the 'Tetris Grid'. Do not use a simple single-column layout.
5. FORMS: Use Shadcn Form components for the Registration and Assessment flows. Ensure validation is robust.
6. CHARTS: Use Recharts for the Student Report. Style them to match the brand colors.
7. FOUNDER SECTION: Create a dedicated section for 'Shubham Raj Singh'. Use a placeholder image if a real one is not available, but style it professionally (e.g., grayscale with a navy overlay).
8. TEST IDs: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts, no purple gradients.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
